summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WiseDrive CRM application - both backend APIs and frontend UI functionality tested successfully

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby attributes for accessibility

passed_tests: Backend API - All 26 tests passed (100% success rate)
Dashboard displays all stat cards correctly (Total Leads: 20, Total Customers: 15, Total Inspections: 15, Total Employees: 7)
Leads page loads with filters and Add New functionality
Customers page loads with edit functionality
Inspections page loads with Scheduled/Unscheduled tabs
Admin page loads with Employee management tabs
Assign City to employee functionality works
Logout functionality works via user dropdown menu
Protected routes redirect to login when not authenticated
All CRUD operations work for Leads, Customers, Inspections, Employees
Dashboard statistics API returns correct data
Utility endpoints (cities, lead sources, statuses) work correctly
